description: Write comprehensive tests achieving 90%+ coverage for all kernel modules: runner, graph_executor, state_manager, knowledge store, skill_composer, evolution engine, and reflector. Tests should exercise real logic paths, edge cases, error handling, and the self-evolution constraints.
steps: Create tests/conftest.py with shared fixtures: tmp_dir for isolated test state, sample graph.yaml fixture, sample state.yaml fixture, sample skills directory with mock SKILL.md files, sample knowledge directory structure.

Create tests/test_runner.py: Test runner.py main() with --dry-run mode, test --goal flag sets current_goal.md, test --max-iterations is respected, test runner exits when max iterations reached, test runner handles missing state.yaml gracefully (creates default), test runner handles invalid graph.yaml with clear error.

Create tests/test_graph_executor.py: Test loading valid graph.yaml, test get_current_node() returns correct node, test advance() moves to next node based on transitions, test cycle detection in graph, test invalid graph (missing nodes, broken transitions) raises clear errors, test adding/removing nodes programmatically, test get_available_transitions() returns correct options.

Create tests/test_state_manager.py: Test load/save state round-trip, test increment_iteration(), test record_decision() appends to JSONL, test record_reflection() appends to JSONL, test update_progress(), test is_complete() returns True when all tasks done, test reset() clears state, test concurrent access safety (file locking or atomic writes).

Create tests/test_knowledge_store.py: Test add_rule() for both manual and learned, test get_rules() with and without filters, test add_skill() and get_skill(), test list_skills() with tag filtering, test add_pattern() and get_patterns(), test rebuild_index() regenerates _index.yaml correctly, test skill not found raises clear error.

Create tests/test_skill_composer.py: Test compose() with single skill returns its content, test compose() with multiple skills concatenates properly, test compose() with nonexistent skill raises error, test validate_composition() detects missing skills, test get_dependency_graph() returns correct structure, test resolve_order() handles dependencies correctly.

Create tests/test_evolution_engine.py: Test propose_change() creates valid change dict, test validate_change() passes for allowed changes (modify graph node, modify prompt), test validate_change() REJECTS changes to protected files (BOOT.md, constitution.md, runner.py), test apply_change() modifies graph.yaml correctly, test apply_change() logs to history.jsonl, test rollback() restores previous state, test get_history() returns all changes.

Create tests/test_reflector.py: Test analyze_iteration() produces reflection with expected fields, test propose_evolution() generates valid change proposals, test extract_rules() produces rule dicts from reflection data, test summarize_progress() returns human-readable summary.
Run full test suite and verify coverage: python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov=kernel --cov=knowledge --cov=memory --cov=runner --cov-report=term-missing --cov-fail-under=90
If coverage is below 90%, add additional tests for uncovered branches/lines until threshold is met.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass: python3.12 -m pytest tests/ -v returns all green
Coverage is 90%+: python3.12 -m pytest tests/ --cov=kernel --cov=knowledge --cov=memory --cov=runner --cov-fail-under=90 passes
Each test file has at least 5 test functions exercising different scenarios
Tests exercise real code paths (not just mocking everything away)
Evolution engine tests specifically verify that protected file modifications are rejected
State manager tests verify JSONL append behavior (not overwrite)
findings: Coverage improved from 93% to 99.50%. All 171 tests pass in ~1 second. Only 3 lines remain uncovered: graph_executor.py:171-172 (defensive except KeyError that is unreachable since node_ids is built from the same list get_node searches) and runner.py:153 (if __name__ == '__main__' guard). The --cov-fail-under=90 threshold passes comfortably.
